trigger.description: Swarm brief detects that Beads issues.jsonl or the local Beads database is newer than its counterpart.
setup_commands: # create a Beads workspace where .beads/issues.jsonl has entries not imported into .beads/beads.db
# the sibling DB-newer case is covered by swarm brief unit tests and repairs with br sync --flush-only

message_contains: Beads JSONL is newer than the local database
